app.name: Spec Generator
app.tagline: Generate project specifications for AI tools in simple steps

projectPicker.title: Pick a project
projectPicker.subtitle: Choose the folder where the generated docs will be saved
projectPicker.noRecent: You don't have any projects yet. Start by creating a new one.
projectPicker.createNewSubtitle: Create an empty folder for a new project
projectPicker.manualPathHint: For advanced users — full path to the folder
projectPicker.pathInvalid: Folder doesn't exist. Want us to create it?
projectPicker.pathNotWritable: No write permissions in this folder
projectPicker.hasStandards: Found a standards.md file in this project

description.title: Describe your project
description.subtitle: Write in plain language what you want to build — that's enough to get started
description.placeholder: E.g. A web app for team task management with assignments, comments and a calendar view…
description.minLength: Description must be at least 20 characters long

tips.title: Tips
items: Describe the problem you want to solve
Say who will use the app
Note how it should differ from existing solutions

questions.title: Clarifying questions
questions.subtitle: Answer a few questions to make the spec accurate
questions.completeness: We have about {percent}% of the info we need
questions.completenessReady: You can finish the questions stage
questions.askMore: Generate more questions based on my answers

tool.title: Pick an AI tool
tool.subtitle: Which tool should we optimize the spec for?
tool.universalDescription: Neutral format that works for any tool

model.title: Pick an AI model
model.subtitle: Which model should generate your spec?

apiKey.label: API key
apiKey.noKey: I don't have a key — show me how to get one

tutorial.title: How to get an API key
tutorial.iHaveKey: I have a key — back to the form
tutorial.stale: This content may be out of date — check the original docs

standards.title: Project standards
standards.existing: We found your standards.md file. Use it?
standards.missing: You don't have a standards.md file
standards.generateMissing: Generate standards.md (best practices for your project)
standards.skipMissing: Skip — generate the spec without standards

generator.title: Standards generator
generator.subtitle: Pick a project type and we'll prepare a standards.md with best practices

generation.title: Generating the spec
generation.subtitle: This may take a moment — grab a coffee

preview.title: Document preview
preview.subtitle: Review the generated docs before saving

demo.banner: Demo mode — data is simulated, nothing will be saved to disk
